title: Hearthstone Mod
description: Brings World of Warcraft-inspired Hearthstones to Minecraft
body:
![Hearthstone Mod](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sythiex/Hearthstone_Mod/refs/heads/1.20.1-Forge/docs/images/banner.png)

A lightweight mod inspired by _World of Warcraft_ that adds a craftable Hearthstone. Bind it to a bed (or a respawn anchor), channel for a few seconds, and teleport home from anywhere.

## How It Works

1.  Sneak-right-click a bed or a charged respawn anchor with the Hearthstone to bind it
2.  Right-click with the Hearthstone to begin channeling
3.  Stay still and avoid taking damage until the cast completes

The Hearthstone has a cooldown between uses. The config lets you adjust the channel time, cooldown, respawn anchor behavior, disable cross-dimensional travel, or block specific dimensions.

## Dependencies

#### Fabric

*   [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
*   Optional: [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for in-game config

#### Forge/NeoForge

*   No dependencies

Feel free to add this mod to your modpack, but please do not rehost the files.

Supported versions: 1.21.1 (NeoForge/Fabric), 1.20.1 (Forge)
